positive: Minimalist, stylized illustration of a joyful sun setting over a geometric mountain range and crystalline sea. The sun is a warm, stylized circle with radiating, segmented rays. The mountains are rendered in deep sapphire blues and emerald greens, using clean, abstract shapes and sharp edges. The sea uses a gradient of turquoise to lavender, reflecting the sunset colors. Composition is centered, following the rule of thirds, emphasizing negative space and clean silhouettes. Use a flat graphic style with subtle halftone patterns and limited color palette for high print contrast, designed for t-shirt printing. High detail, vectors art, clean lines, poster style, retro-futurism.
negative: blurry, noise, jpeg artifacts, low resolution, text, watermark, signature, out of frame, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poor quality, sketch, painting, photorealistic
